titleStmt.title: SII 9.517: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 517. (A.R. No. 431 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF A HOUSE TO THE SOUTH OF THE TANK CALLED SANNAKAREKATTE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and is dated Śaka 1447 = A.D. 1525 (the details being lost), in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It states that while Viṭharasa-Voḍeya, son of Lakshmīnārāyaṇa-Karaṇika, was ruling the Bārakūra-rājya, Nāraṇamunila of Chennavāra, son of Tammimunila-Saṅkaraseṭṭi of the Paḍuvakēri of Basrūr and Kupaṇa-Seṭṭi caused the construction of a maṭha to Lakshmīnārāyaṇadēva and endowed it with lands and interest-bearing grants of money outstanding on many persons (named).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaḥ śrīlakṣmīnārāyaṇadēvarēgati . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trayilō
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījādbhudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1446 saṁdu Ēḷaneya pā
śu 1 lū śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa kruṣṇarāyamahārāya
siṁhvāsanadalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ sakalasāṁbrājyavanu pratipālisutiha kāladalū Avara nirūpa
diṁda lakṣumīnārāyaṇakaraṇikara kumāra viṭharasavoḍeyarū bārakūra rājyavanu pratipālisutiha kāladalū basu
ṟūra paḍuvakēryya taṁmimunilasaṁkaraseṭiya maga ceṁnavarada nāraṇamunilanū kupaṇaseṭiyū yibarū kaṭisida
lakṣumīnārāyaṇadēvarige maṭhaku nārāyaṇamunilanū taṁna baṁda pālige biṭa dharmada bāḷa vivara . kaṁdāura grāma baḍukū
ra voḷage baṁṇaṇiya bācaṁṇauḍupara moṁmaga vāsudēvauḍupana kayyalu mūlavagi koṁḍa bāḷa catusīme vivara mūḍalu
harida bacaliṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu kēśauḍupara makaḷa gaḍiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu vāstēuḍupara gaḍiṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu kūñedēva
ra kuṁṅamauḍupara gaḍiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeyiṁda voḷage bittudu nāuṁḍeyalu ma 1 ... 0 mataṁ Ayivadāneya catu
sīme vivara mūḍalu saṁkaruḍupara kuṁṅamauḍupara gaḍiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu vāstēuḍupara gaḍiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu harida baca
liṁda muḍalu baḍagalu keḷamane śīvaṇauḍupara gaḍiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmevoḷage bittudu nāuṁḍalu mu 1 . 0 Aṁtu gade mu 3 Ali U
ḷaṁthā nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāśāṇa modalāgi lakṣmīnārāyaṇadēvarige nāraṇamunilaru nārāyaṇauḍupara maga vāsu
dēvauḍupana kayalu mūlava koṁḍu dēvarige yerasida dhārāpūrva yī patrapaṭa Aḍakake bāḷisi koḍuvaṁtāgi Adamō
ṇi kuñidēvara maga kuñimauḍuparu dhūregaḷu kēśavauḍupara maga śivaṇauḍupara maga Umeya nā
rāyaṇauḍuparu yī bāḷige teru kāṭiya lekadalu ¥ 1 . = . modalu mataṁ mane kaḷana catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu paḍuva dēva
ra dēvasvada gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu mahēśvarauḍupara gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu kavaṇiya nāraṇauḍupara gaḍiyiṁda mu
ḍalu baḍagalu harida hoḷeyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmevoḷage bitudu nāuḍalu mu 5 Adaroḷagaṁṇa mane kaḷa Ali Uḷanthādu
saha mataṁ paḍuvamekeya catusīmeya vivara muḍalu kavaṇanāraṇauḍupa cāpeya nāraṇauḍupana gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁ
kalu kācukuṁjakaḷakuñamauḍupara gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu mūḍavoḷagaṇa nāraṇauḍupana gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu baḍaga
lu Uḷa harikēśauḍupara gaḍiṁda teṁkalu yīcatusīmeya voḷage bitudu mekki nāuṁḍelu mu 6 mataṁ mekkiya catusīme
mūḍalu mahēśvarauḍupara gaḍiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu hariharauḍupara gaḍiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu hebārara gaḍiṁda muḍa
baḍagalu dēvasvada gaḍiṁda teṁkalu �yo nālku catussīme Oḷage bitudu nāuṁḍelu mu 1 Ubhaya mu 12 yī bāḷanu
biḍāruvāravāgi biṭu kaḍaṁgoṁḍa do va ga 25 Akṣaradalu yipataAyidu varaha yī bāḷige teru . grāma vāsudēvauḍupa
bāgilu hoṁnu 23 yī bāḷanu Alikesālike bāḷisi koḍuvaṁtāgi Adahoṇe Umeya śivaṇauḍupara maga nāraṇauḍupa
yī bāḷiṁge mayisāla kuṁdu heḍakaṭu mulādi saha saṁda doḍavaraha ga 41 . mata Akki mu 20 ... 5 muṁde yī bāḷu bēkeṁdare
yī Akki baḍiya hoṁnanu Akiyanu voṁdu murāgi terubaheneṁdu vāsudēvauḍupa voḍaṁbaṭu barasikoṭa baraha
yidake hoṇe kuñedēvara maga Aṇamakēsauḍupa śakṣi Umeyanāraṇana sakṣi yīsaruvasada teru kaḷaci dēvakāriyake naḍava Aki
mu 18 mataṁ baḷukūra kuṁñaṁmauḍupara makaḷu nārāyaṇauḍupa rāmauḍu pa yibara mūlada bāḷa catusī
meya vivara bāgila gade mūḍalu Aṁṇauḍupara gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu maneṭhāviṁda baḍagalu Aṁṇauḍupara gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu Aṁ
baladiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmevoḷage bitudu nāuṁḍelu mu 2 mataṁ mekki catusīme vivara muḍalu kōṇama
kki Aṇanagaḍiyiṁda paḍvulu hittilagadeyiṁda baḍagalu harida bacaliṁda muḍalu kruṣṇauḍupara gaḍiṁda teṁkalu yi
ṁtī catusīmevoḷage bitudu nāuṁḍelu mu 1 . 0 matta guḷiya nōḍi catusīme vivara muḍalu kuñibācaṇauḍupara gaḍiṁda paḍuva
rāmauḍupara gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu harida vōṇiyiṁda muḍalu bācanāraṇauḍupara gaḍiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmevoḷage bitudu nāuṁ
ḍelu mu 1 . 5 Ubha maki meke saha nāuṁḍelu mu 5 hāne 5 yī bāḷa biḍāruvāravāgi biṭu kaḍaṁgoṁḍadu doḍavara
ha ga 28 Akṣaradalu yipatayeṁṭu varaha yī bāḷige teru vāstēvauḍupara hadināḍu mekkege ¥ 1 yidake baṁda
hoṁbaḷe Aki bāgilagadege sēnabōvana ¥ . = Adake baṁda hoṁbaḷa Aki yī bāḷa Ālike sālike bāḷisi koḍuva
ṁtāgi Āda hoṇe nārāyaṇauḍupara maga rāmauḍupara ma 30 muḍuginalu gujāḍiyalu kruṣṇa koḍacara mūlada bāḷu muḍabayala vi
vara mu hoḷeyiṁda pa . te . hoḷeyiṁda ba . paḍuvalu gujāḍiya kaḷagaḍiyiṁ mu baḍagalu taṁma gaḍiyiṁda hedāri Aṁciṁda te yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdo
ḷagaṇa baya mu 11 tōṭada gaḍi vivara baḍagalu harida haḷḷadiṁ telu mālukoḍajara gaḍiṁda palu telu gujāḍi Ā kaḷagaḍiyiṁ balu palu viṭa
lāḍana gaḍi mulu yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁda voḷaguḷa tōṭa sahavāgi Ā bāḷu tōṭada mēle Āruvāravāgi koṭa Artha kāṭiva ga 170
yī bāḷige teru ¥ 20 modalu naḍasā Aki mu 15 mataṁ baḍaga naḍava hedāriya kaḍakaliṁda teṁ . mūḍalu hariva hoḷeyiṁ palu teṁkalu harida baḍaga paḍuvalu taṁma
gaḍi gujāḍiyada gaḍi mu . yiṁtī nālkugaḍiyiṁda voḷagaṇa baya mu 7 . kaḍi mu 2 Ubhaya mu 9 . tōṭada vivara baḍaga hariva hoḷe teṁka mūḍa Aṁṇa
rameyipāḍipe mu teṁkalu gujāḍiyada gaḍiṁba ga . paḍuvalu viṭalāḍana gaḍiyiṁ mū . yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷagaṇa tōṭa sahavāgi Āruvārava māḍiko
ṁḍu koṭa varaha ga 120 yī bāḷige teru ¥ 2 . modalu naḍayisuva A mu 19 mataṁ baḍaga subraṁhaṇyakoḍacara gaḍiyiṁ teṁka muḍalu hariva hoḷeyi
ṁ paḍuva teṁkalu naḍava hedāriyiṁ ba . paḍuvalu saṁkaragujāḍi gaḍiyiṁda mu . yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷagaṇa gade mu 1 . yī bāḷa mēle Ādiyāgi
koṭa ga 5 biḍi Aki mu 1 maṁkiya voḷage baḍagalu haḷḷavi ke muḍalu saṁkarahebārara gaḍiyiṁ paḍu . teṁka . saṁkaragujāḍi gaḍiyiṁda baḍa . pa . saṁkaragu
jāḍi gaḍi mu . te . yiṁtī nāluku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage meke mu 1 . yī bāḷamēle Ādiyāgi koṭa kāṭi do ga 30 yī hoṁnige baḍi Aki mu 3 mattaṁ makiya
catusīme hoḷeyiṁ teṁka mūḍa kruṣṇahebārana makaḷa gaḍiyiṁ paḍuva teṁkalu saṁkaragujāḍiya gaḍiyiṁ ba . pa . saṁkaragujāḍi gaḍi
muḍalu yiṁtī catusīmeya voḷagaṇa ma mu 2 . yī bāḷa mēle Ādiyāgi koṭa varaha ga 30 yī honna baḍi A mu 6
mataṁ kuṁbhāramakagaḍiyiṁda te . muḍalu Āluva kōṭiya gaḍi hebārakaḷa gaḍi paḍu . teṁkalu Aluva kōṭigaḍi bede paḍuva
mu yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷagaṇa ba muḷi malagade mu 5 Ubhayaṁ nāghaṁḍugada mu 9 mane ṭhāu maṁḍi mara pala saha
vāgi Aruvārava māḍikoṁḍu koṭa varaha ga 100 yī hoṁnige baḍi A mu 10 mahādēvarige Abhiśēkhake biṭa bāḷu haḍuvinoḷa
ge saṁkarakoḍajana mūla bāḷu bara harida hoḷe teṁka mū harida hoḷe teṁkalu bhaṭakaḷa gaḍi paḍu saṁkarakoḍucena gaḍi yiṁtī nālku ga
ḍiya voḷage teṁgineriya huraṇa hadinayidu hāne saha ba mu 1 . Aruvāravāgi koṭa ga 30 te hade bhamu 2 . naḍasu Aki maṁIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 9.517 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
